workflow.name: Daily Deposit Allocation
workflow.description:
# UC1: Daily Deposit Allocation

End-to-end processing of a daily deposit allocation file. Ingests the bank statement, records the allocation file header, allocates each consumer's share, then reconciles clearing and control accounts.

## Steps

1. **Ingest Bank Statement** (T5401) -- Record each FBO statement line: DR Settled, CR Control on the economic ledger; mirror on the allocation ledger. Repeats per line item.
2. **Record Batch Header** (T5102) -- Create per-file Clearing balance from the allocation file total. One event per file.
3. **Allocate Consumer Share** (T5101) -- Post each consumer's deposit to Hold (20101) and track on the allocation ledger. Repeats per consumer.
4. **Flush Clearing** (T5402) -- Zero Clearing Total into Suspense, move consumer funds from Hold to Available, confirm allocation ledger positions.
5. **Flush Control** (T5407) -- Zero Control into Suspense. Both Suspense accounts net to zero, proving clearing and control sides agree.

**Final state:** Clearing, Control, and Suspense all zero. Consumer Available increased, Settled increased -- funds arrived at the FBO and are allocated.

steps.description: Record the bank statement line item: debit Settled (10100) and credit Control (10102) on the economic ledger; debit Cash Balances (11900) and credit Cash Balances – Control (11902) on the allocation ledger.
steps.repeat_while_description: Fires once per inbound line item in the bank statement file.

steps.description: Ingest the allocation file batch header: debit Clearing Total (10101) and credit the per-file Clearing instance to establish the clearing balance for this file.

Allocate each consumer’s share: debit per-file Clearing (10101) and credit Customer Hold (20101) on the economic ledger; debit Cash Balances – Clearing (11901) and credit Customer Master FBO Clearing (21101) on the allocation ledger.
steps.repeat_while_description: Fires once per consumer line item in the allocation file. A 300k-consumer file produces 300k independent events, each as its own atomic commit spanning both ledgers.

steps.description: Reconcile clearing: zero out Clearing Total into Suspense (10103) on the economic ledger, move consumer funds from Hold (20101) to Available (20100), flush Cash Balances – Clearing (11901) into Cash Balances – Suspense (11903) on the allocation ledger, and confirm consumer FBO positions from Clearing (21101) to settled (21100).
steps.condition_description: Fires when the per-file Clearing (10101) instance balance reaches zero, confirming all consumer allocations for the file have committed.

steps.description: Reconcile control: flush Control (10102) into Suspense (10103) on the economic ledger, and flush Cash Balances – Control (11902) into Cash Balances – Suspense (11903) on the allocation ledger. Suspense nets to zero on both ledgers.
steps.condition_description: Fires when the matching engine pairs a bank statement Control entry against an allocation file. Independent of Template 4 — can fire in either order.
